fa-box-up.appearanceId: rectangular box with open top flaps folded upward on both sides; cardboard carton with outward-splayed lid panels
fa-box-up.functionalityId: uploads or sends a packaged item upward; expands or unpacks a boxed container
fa-box-up.intentId: ship or export a boxed item; open or unpack a package

fa-box-usd.appearanceId: rectangular box with a dollar sign overlaid or embedded on its face; cardboard carton with a currency symbol
fa-box-usd.functionalityId: opens pricing or cost details for a packaged item; marks a box as containing monetary or purchase information
fa-box-usd.intentId: view the price of a packaged product; manage financial details for a shipment

fa-boxes.appearanceId: two or more stacked rectangular box shapes grouped together; cluster of cardboard carton silhouettes
fa-boxes.functionalityId: navigates to an inventory or stock listing; opens a bulk items or warehouse management view
fa-boxes.intentId: manage multiple packages or inventory units; view a collection of stored goods

fa-boxes-packing.appearanceId: two rectangular boxes with a small human figure loading or placing items; stacked cartons beside a packing person silhouette
fa-boxes-packing.functionalityId: initiates a packing or fulfillment workflow; opens order preparation or shipping queue
fa-boxes-packing.intentId: prepare items for shipment or storage; start a packing or fulfillment process

fa-boxing-glove.appearanceId: large rounded padded glove with a cuffed wrist band; bulky mitten-shaped sports glove silhouette
fa-boxing-glove.functionalityId: tags content as boxing or combat sport related; marks a fighting or training activity
fa-boxing-glove.intentId: navigate to boxing or martial arts content; find fighting sports equipment or events

fa-bracket.appearanceId: single vertical left-facing square bracket; straight open-ended L-shaped punctuation mark pointing right
fa-bracket.functionalityId: inserts an opening square bracket character; wraps selected text in a left bracket
fa-bracket.intentId: begin a bracketed expression or code block; delimit the start of an array or annotation

fa-bracket-curly.appearanceId: single left-facing curly brace with a central knob; open curly bracket pointing rightward
fa-bracket-curly.functionalityId: inserts an opening curly brace character; wraps selected content in a left curly bracket
fa-bracket-curly.intentId: start a code block or object literal; open a curly-brace delimited expression

fa-bracket-curly-right.appearanceId: single right-facing curly brace with a central knob; closing curly bracket pointing leftward
fa-bracket-curly-right.functionalityId: inserts a closing curly brace character; closes a curly-bracket-delimited expression
fa-bracket-curly-right.intentId: end a code block or object literal; close a curly-brace delimited structure

fa-bracket-round-right.appearanceId: single right-facing curved parenthesis arc; closing round bracket pointing leftward
fa-bracket-round-right.functionalityId: inserts a closing parenthesis character; closes a round-bracket-delimited expression
fa-bracket-round-right.intentId: end a parenthetical expression or function call; close a grouped formula or annotation

fa-bracket-square-right.appearanceId: single right-facing square bracket; straight open-ended L-shape pointing leftward
fa-bracket-square-right.functionalityId: inserts a closing square bracket character; closes a square-bracket-delimited expression
fa-bracket-square-right.intentId: end an array, index, or bracketed annotation; close a square-bracket group

fa-brackets.appearanceId: matching pair of left and right square brackets flanking an empty space; two vertical L-shaped marks facing each other
fa-brackets.functionalityId: wraps selected text or code in square brackets; inserts a bracket pair around content
fa-brackets.intentId: enclose an expression, array, or annotation in square brackets; delimit a code element

fa-brackets-curly.appearanceId: matching pair of left and right curly braces flanking an empty space; two mirrored curly brackets facing each other
fa-brackets-curly.functionalityId: wraps selected content in curly braces; inserts a curly-bracket pair around code or text
fa-brackets-curly.intentId: enclose a code block, object, or template expression in curly braces; delimit a structured block

fa-braille.appearanceId: grid of raised dots arranged in two columns of three; six-dot tactile cell pattern
fa-braille.functionalityId: toggles accessibility or braille output mode; opens braille or screen reader settings
fa-braille.intentId: enable tactile or braille accessibility features; switch to an accessible reading format

fa-brain.appearanceId: rounded organ shape with convoluted folded ridges and a central vertical dividing line; wrinkled cerebral hemisphere pair
fa-brain.functionalityId: opens AI, cognitive, or intelligence-related features; navigates to a machine learning or smart tool section
fa-brain.intentId: access intelligent or AI-powered functionality; explore cognitive or knowledge-based tools

fa-brain-circuit.appearanceId: rounded brain shape overlaid with electronic circuit lines and nodes; cerebral silhouette combined with a PCB trace pattern
fa-brain-circuit.functionalityId: opens an AI or neural network configuration panel; links to machine learning or smart automation settings
fa-brain-circuit.intentId: configure or explore AI and neural processing features; access intelligent automation tools

fa-brake-warning.appearanceId: circular or exclamation-marked disc brake symbol with a warning indicator; brake pad outline with an alert badge
fa-brake-warning.functionalityId: triggers a brake system alert or vehicle warning notification; highlights a brake fault or maintenance requirement
fa-brake-warning.intentId: respond to a brake system warning; check or service a vehicle brake fault

fa-brazilian-real-sign.appearanceId: stylized letter R with two horizontal strike-through bars; currency glyph resembling a striped R
fa-brazilian-real-sign.functionalityId: inserts or displays the Brazilian real currency symbol; labels a monetary value in BRL
fa-brazilian-real-sign.intentId: indicate a price or amount in Brazilian reais; select BRL as the currency format

fa-bread-loaf.appearanceId: domed rectangular loaf shape with a scored top line; rounded elongated baked-bread silhouette
fa-bread-loaf.functionalityId: navigates to a bakery or bread product category; marks a baked goods item or food listing
fa-bread-loaf.intentId: find bread or bakery products; browse baked goods in a food catalog

fa-bread-slice.appearanceId: single trapezoidal or rounded square bread slice with a crust border; flat cut piece of loaf with an outer edge ring
fa-bread-slice.functionalityId: selects or marks a bread or toast item; opens a bakery or grain food category
fa-bread-slice.intentId: choose bread as a meal component; browse toast or sandwich ingredient options

fa-bread-slice-butter.appearanceId: square bread slice with a rectangular butter pat on top; toast shape with a small block overlay on its surface
fa-bread-slice-butter.functionalityId: adds a butter topping or spread option to a food item; marks a toast-with-butter menu choice
fa-bread-slice-butter.intentId: select buttered toast as a meal option; customize a bread order with a butter topping

fa-bridge.appearanceId: flat horizontal span supported by two vertical pillars or piers rising from below; simple beam bridge silhouette with support columns
fa-bridge.functionalityId: navigates to infrastructure or civil engineering content; marks a crossing point or route connection
fa-bridge.intentId: find a bridge or crossing location on a map; access infrastructure management or routing tools

fa-bridge-circle-check.appearanceId: beam bridge silhouette with a small circle containing a checkmark overlaid at the corner; bridge structure with a verified badge
fa-bridge-circle-check.functionalityId: marks a bridge route as open, verified, or safe to use; confirms a crossing point is cleared
fa-bridge-circle-check.intentId: confirm a bridge is operational and safe to cross; verify infrastructure status

fa-bridge-circle-exclamation.appearanceId: beam bridge silhouette with a small circle containing an exclamation mark at the corner; bridge structure with a warning badge
fa-bridge-circle-exclamation.functionalityId: alerts the user to a bridge hazard, closure, or issue; highlights an infrastructure warning
fa-bridge-circle-exclamation.intentId: investigate a bridge warning or hazard alert; check on a potentially compromised crossing

fa-bridge-circle-xmark.appearanceId: beam bridge silhouette with a small circle containing an X mark at the corner; bridge structure with a closed or rejected badge
fa-bridge-circle-xmark.functionalityId: marks a bridge as closed, blocked, or unavailable; indicates a crossing route is impassable
fa-bridge-circle-xmark.intentId: identify a bridge that is closed or unusable; reroute around an inaccessible crossing

fa-bridge-lock.appearanceId: beam bridge silhouette with a padlock shape overlaid or beside it; bridge structure combined with a lock symbol
fa-bridge-lock.functionalityId: marks a bridge route as restricted or access-controlled; locks down a crossing point
fa-bridge-lock.intentId: indicate a bridge with restricted or gated access; manage access control for a crossing

fa-bridge-suspension.appearanceId: two tall towers with cables drooping in a catenary curve to a horizontal deck; suspension bridge silhouette with hanging cable arcs
fa-bridge-suspension.functionalityId: navigates to suspension bridge information or a large-span infrastructure route; marks a major crossing point
fa-bridge-suspension.intentId: find or identify a suspension bridge on a map; access details about a large infrastructure crossing

fa-bridge-water.appearanceId: bridge arch or deck silhouette with wavy lines below representing water; spanning structure over horizontal wave shapes
fa-bridge-water.functionalityId: marks a bridge crossing over a body of water; navigates to waterway or river crossing information
fa-bridge-water.intentId: identify a bridge over water on a map; find a route that crosses a river or waterway

fa-briefcase.appearanceId: rectangular case with a central hinged handle on top and a horizontal clasp line; classic suitcase-style work bag profile
fa-briefcase.functionalityId: opens a portfolio, work files, or job-related section; accesses professional documents or career features
fa-briefcase.intentId: manage work files or professional documents; navigate to a career or business section

fa-briefcase-arrow-right.appearanceId: rectangular briefcase shape with a rightward-pointing arrow overlaid or beside it; work bag with a forward navigation symbol
fa-briefcase-arrow-right.functionalityId: transfers or moves work files to another location; sends a briefcase or portfolio to a destination
fa-briefcase-arrow-right.intentId: export or forward professional documents; move a work portfolio to a new location

fa-briefcase-blank.appearanceId: rectangular briefcase outline with a handle on top and no interior detail; plain empty work bag silhouette
fa-briefcase-blank.functionalityId: creates a new empty project or portfolio; opens a blank work container for new files
fa-briefcase-blank.intentId: start a new work folder or empty briefcase; create a blank professional workspace

fa-briefcase-medical.appearanceId: rectangular case with a top handle and a cross or plus symbol on the face; medical kit bag with a health cross emblem
fa-briefcase-medical.functionalityId: opens a medical kit, first-aid section, or health records panel; accesses clinical tools or patient files
fa-briefcase-medical.intentId: access medical supplies or health documentation; navigate to first-aid or clinical management features

fa-brightness.appearanceId: filled circle with evenly spaced rays radiating outward all around; solid sun shape with symmetric spoke lines
fa-brightness.functionalityId: adjusts the display brightness level; opens a screen luminance control slider
fa-brightness.intentId: increase or change the screen brightness; control display light output

fa-brightness-low.appearanceId: small circle with shorter or fewer radiating rays; diminished sun shape with stubby spoke lines
fa-brightness-low.functionalityId: sets or indicates a reduced brightness level; dims the display or lowers screen luminance
fa-brightness-low.intentId: lower the screen brightness for comfort or power saving; switch to a low-light display mode

fa-bring-forward.appearanceId: two overlapping rectangles where the front one is slightly offset and highlighted; stacked square shapes with the upper layer emphasized
fa-bring-forward.functionalityId: moves a selected layer or object one step forward in the stacking order; brings an element closer to the front
fa-bring-forward.intentId: place a design element in front of partially overlapping objects; adjust layer ordering forward by one step

fa-bring-front.appearanceId: two overlapping rectangles where the front rectangle is fully on top; stacked squares with the topmost layer fully covering others
fa-bring-front.functionalityId: moves a selected element to the very front of the layer stack; places an object above all others
fa-bring-front.intentId: ensure a design element is on top of all others; bring a layer to the absolute front

fa-broadcast-tower.appearanceId: tall triangular lattice tower with curved signal arc lines emanating from the top; antenna mast with radio wave arcs
fa-broadcast-tower.functionalityId: opens a live broadcast, streaming, or radio channel; manages a signal transmission or broadcasting feature
fa-broadcast-tower.intentId: start or tune into a live broadcast or radio stream; access signal transmission settings

fa-broccoli.appearanceId: rounded floret cluster on top of a thick stalk; vegetable silhouette with a bushy domed head and stem
fa-broccoli.functionalityId: marks a vegetable or healthy food category; selects broccoli as a meal ingredient
fa-broccoli.intentId: add broccoli to a recipe or food order; browse vegetables or healthy food options

fa-broom.appearanceId: long handle attached to a tapered wedge-shaped bristle head at the bottom; sweeping stick with a splayed brush end
fa-broom.functionalityId: clears or purges selected data, cache, or items; sweeps away temporary files or notifications
fa-broom.intentId: clean up or remove unwanted content; purge temporary data or reset a workspace

fa-broom-wide.appearanceId: long handle with a wider flat bristle head at the bottom; broad sweeping stick with an extended brush base
fa-broom-wide.functionalityId: performs a thorough or wide-area cleanup of data or content; clears a larger set of items or cache entries
fa-broom-wide.intentId: do a comprehensive cleanup of files or workspace; remove a broad range of unwanted items

fa-browser.appearanceId: rectangular frame with a horizontal address bar strip at the top and a blank content area below; web window outline with a toolbar header
fa-browser.functionalityId: opens a web browser view or embedded web panel; navigates to a URL or web-based content
fa-browser.intentId: visit a website or open a browser window; access web-based resources or pages

fa-browsers.appearanceId: two overlapping browser window rectangles each with a top address bar; stacked web window silhouettes
fa-browsers.functionalityId: manages or switches between multiple browser tabs or windows; opens a multi-window browsing view
fa-browsers.intentId: handle several open browser sessions at once; switch between multiple web pages

fa-brush.appearanceId: angled handle tapering to a pointed bristle tip; artist paintbrush with a ferrule and pointed head
fa-brush.functionalityId: activates a paint or drawing brush tool; opens a stroke style or brush settings panel
fa-brush.intentId: paint or draw freehand on a canvas; customize brush stroke appearance

fa-bucket.appearanceId: cylindrical container wider at the top than the bottom with a small handle arc; tapered pail silhouette with a bail grip
fa-bucket.functionalityId: activates a paint bucket fill tool; fills a selected area with color or pattern
fa-bucket.intentId: flood-fill a region with a chosen color; apply a background fill to a selected area

fa-bug.appearanceId: oval insect body with six legs, two antennae, and wing-like outlines; rounded beetle silhouette with appendages
fa-bug.functionalityId: reports or opens a bug or error tracking entry; navigates to a defect or issue log
fa-bug.intentId: submit or review a software bug report; access the issue tracker or error log

fa-bug-slash.appearanceId: oval insect silhouette crossed by a diagonal slash line; beetle shape with a line cutting through it
fa-bug-slash.functionalityId: marks a bug as resolved or dismissed; disables bug reporting for an item
fa-bug-slash.intentId: close or resolve a reported software bug; indicate that an issue has been fixed

fa-bugs.appearanceId: two insect silhouettes grouped together; pair of beetle or bug shapes side by side
fa-bugs.functionalityId: opens a list of multiple bugs or issues; indicates several defects or errors are present
fa-bugs.intentId: review multiple software bugs or defects; manage a collection of reported issues

fa-building.appearanceId: rectangular multi-story building facade with rows of small square windows; flat-front office block silhouette with window grid
fa-building.functionalityId: navigates to a company, organization, or location profile; marks a real-estate or corporate entity
fa-building.intentId: find an office, company, or building location; access organizational or real-estate information

fa-building-circle-arrow-right.appearanceId: rectangular building silhouette with a small circle containing a rightward arrow overlaid at the corner; office block with a forward navigation badge
fa-building-circle-arrow-right.functionalityId: navigates away from or out of a building or organization record; transfers to a linked location or entity
fa-building-circle-arrow-right.intentId: move to an associated building or organization; follow a link from a building to a related destination
